title: aira elegantissima subsp. hosteana
intro: Aira elegantissima subsp. hosteana, also known as the elegant hair-grass or Hoste's hair-grass, is a subspecies of grass in the family Poaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Aira elegantissima subsp. hosteana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly used to leverage its medicinal properties and health benefits.
